――<user>に恩返しをするため、<br>娼館で働くことにしたダリア。今日は初:
Daria decided to work at the brothel to repay the Commander. Today
was her first day on the job.
（そろそろお客様が来る頃ですね……。<br>親方以外の人と、うまくやれるでしょう:
(Customer will come soon... Can I do well with someone other than
Boss...?)
（来ましたね。ここは、笑顔で迎えなければ……っ！）: (He's here. I must greet him with a smile...!)
思いとは裏腹に、ダリアはまったく笑顔を浮かべられてなかった。: Despite her best intentions, Daria couldn't manage a smile.
や、やっぱり帰ります……！: A-ah, as I thought, I'll go home...!
あ、待ってください。帰られると――困ります。: Ah, please wait. If you leave... that's a problem.
本来は優しい言葉をかけるべきだが、ダリアの声音は冷たい。<br>圧力に怯んだ男性:
Normally she should've said something gentle, but Daria's voice was
cold. Intimidated by the pressure, the man whimpered and spoke.
そ、その……すみません。<br>実は俺、童貞で――こういう店も、初めてで……:
U-um... I'm sorry. Actually, I'm a virgin—and this is my first time at a
place like this too...
（……困りました。こんな状況は、研修で教えてもらってない。<br>どうしましょう:
(...This is a problem. They didn't teach me about this situation in
training. What should I do... Maybe I should be honest too...)
私も、客を取るのは初めてです。: I've never had a customer before either.
けど、あなたが望むことならなんでもしますので、<br>気兼ねなく仰ってください…:
But I'll do anything you want. So please, don't hesitate to tell me...
I—Daria—am yours tonight.
ダリアの言葉に、ようやく青年の顔に笑みが浮かぶ。<br>そして、じゃあ――とダリ:
At Daria's words, a smile finally appeared on the young man's face.
And then, 'Well then—' he began to tell her what he wanted her to do.
